observations.anatomy: The head, facial planes, jaw, cranium, ears, neck and profile read as grounded adult anatomy from every rendered view.
observations.likeness: The seed remains younger, smoother and structurally unlike the target around skull proportions, eyelids, nose, mouth, jaw and age character.
observations.boundary: This proves the anatomical seed layer only; it does not prove image fitting, production topology, texture, rigging or animation.

next: Fit GNM identity parameters to target front landmarks and silhouette while retaining profile plausibility.
